sql_array: SET VARIABLE my_var = 50; SELECT getvariable('my_var') AS current_value;

CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER); INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 100), (2, 200); SET VARIABLE total_sum = (SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_table); SELECT getvariable('total_sum') AS sum_result;

SET VARIABLE my_threshold = 75; CREATE TABLE threshold_table (num INTEGER); INSERT INTO threshold_table VALUES (50), (80), (30); SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_above_threshold FROM threshold_table WHERE num > getvariable('my_threshold');
SET VARIABLE my_string = 'Hello'; UPDATE test_table SET value = value * 2 WHERE id = 1; SELECT getvariable('my_string') AS greeting, value FROM test_table;

SET VARIABLE col_to_select = 'value'; CREATE TABLE another_table (name VARCHAR, value INTEGER); INSERT INTO another_table VALUES ('A', 10), ('B', 20); SELECT getvariable('col_to_select') AS selected_column, name FROM another_table;
